LanguageData.Ammo_MoyoBallista.label: Moyo charge bolt
LanguageData.Ammo_MoyoBallista.description: High power ion charge bolt for use against heavy targets such as mechanoids or power armor.
LanguageData.Bullet_MoyoBallista.label: moyo heavy chargebolt
LanguageData.Ammo_MoyoCryocell.label: Moyo cryocell
LanguageData.Ammo_MoyoCryocell.description: Weaponized cryofreezing cell for Moyo cryotech weapons.
LanguageData.Bullet_MoyoCryocell.label: moyo cryoblast
LanguageData.Bullet_MoyoCryocannon.label: moyo cryoblast

LanguageData.Bullet_Abyssnail.label: abyssal nail
